title: Brazil Inflation: A Century of History
description: Historical reconstruction of Brazilian inflation from the early 20th century through the present, capturing hyperinflation episodes, currency changes, and the Real Plan stabilization.

title: Residential Property Price Index — Brazil
description: Residential property price index (RPPI) tracking real estate values across major Brazilian metro areas over time.

title: Gapminder: Health & Wealth of Nations
description: Recreation of Gapminder's iconic bubble chart showing the relationship between GDP per capita and life expectancy across countries.

title: World Happiness Report
description: Visualization of Our World in Data happiness scores and their relationship to income, social support, and freedom indicators.

title: Hamilton Filter — Trend Decomposition
description: Business cycle analysis using the Hamilton (2018) filter to decompose an economic time series into trend and cyclical components.

title: Moving Average Trend Estimation
description: Comparison of different moving average windows for trend estimation in economic time series.

title: STL Trend Decomposition
description: Seasonal-Trend decomposition using LOESS (STL), separating a time series into trend, seasonal, and remainder components.

title: Economic Growth Breakdown — Nexo Style
description: Decomposition of economic growth by demand components, styled after Nexo Jornal's visual language.

title: FT-Style Chart
description: Economic chart styled after the Financial Times visual identity, including their signature salmon background and typography.

title: Folha de S.Paulo Style Chart
description: Economic visualization styled after Folha de S.Paulo's data journalism aesthetic.

title: Time Series Line Plot
description: Clean multi-series line plot demonstrating ggplot2 theming and annotation conventions.

title: Building Permits: Cross-City Scatter
description: Scatterplot relating building permit volumes to demographic and housing market indicators across Brazilian cities.

title: Relative Values Heatmap
description: Heatmap showing relative values (share or ratio) across two categorical dimensions in an urban dataset.

title: Age Index Map — Census 2010
description: Choropleth map of the aging index (population 60+ / population under 15) by municipality from the 2010 Brazilian census.

title: Age Index Map — Census 2022
description: Updated aging index map using the 2022 census, showing accelerating demographic aging in southern and inland municipalities.

title: Racial Demographics — IBGE Census
description: Spatial distribution of racial self-identification shares across Brazilian municipalities from the 2022 census.

title: Illiteracy Rates — Regional Panel
description: Small-multiple panel showing the evolution of illiteracy rates across Brazil's five major regions over several decades.

title: Brazil Births — Wave & Seasonality
description: Wavy visualization of monthly birth counts in Brazil, revealing seasonal rhythms and long-run fertility trends.

title: Visualizing a Single Variable
description: Tutorial-style chart demonstrating multiple ways to visualize a single continuous variable: histogram, boxplot, violin, and density.

title: Climate Change: Issue Awareness
description: Survey-based visualization of public awareness and concern about climate change across countries and demographic groups.

title: GOAT Films: A Data Lens on Cinema
description: Visual analysis of all-time greatest films based on aggregated critic scores, audience ratings, and cultural longevity metrics.

title: Part to Whole
description: Day 1 of the 2026 #30DayChartChallenge. Part-to-whole composition exploring proportional structure in a dataset.

title: Mosaic
description: Day 3 — mosaic chart exploring proportional relationships between two or more categorical variables.

title: Experimental
description: Day 5 — experimental chart form stepping outside conventional visualization types.

title: Wealth Distribution
description: Day 9 — distribution of wealth across households or countries, visualizing inequality.

title: Evolution
description: Day 19 — long-run evolution of a key indicator highlighting structural change over time.

title: Global Change
description: Day 20 — global-scale trends showing change across countries or regions over time.

title: Historical
description: Day 21 — long historical data series, emphasizing deep time perspective in data visualization.

title: Seasons
description: Day 23 — seasonal patterns in a time series, decomposing cyclical variation across the year.

title: Fractions
description: Day 1 of the 2025 challenge — fractions shown as part-to-whole column or stacked bar chart.

title: Slope
description: Day 2 — slope chart comparing values between two time points across multiple groups.

title: Circular
description: Day 3 — circular chart inspired by Brasília's urban planning concentric ring structure.

title: Big or Small
description: Day 4 — juxtaposition of scale extremes, large vs. small within a single dataset.

title: Ranking
description: Day 5 — ranked bar chart or bump chart showing ordinal positions across groups.

title: Florence Nightingale
description: Day 6 — polar area (rose) chart in homage to Florence Nightingale's coxcomb diagram.

title: Outliers
description: Day 7 — visualization specifically designed to highlight and contextualize outliers in a dataset.

title: Histogram
description: Day 8 — histogram showing the frequency distribution of a continuous variable with careful bin selection.

title: Diverging
description: Day 9 — diverging bar chart or color scale emphasizing values above and below a central baseline.

title: Multi-modal
description: Day 10 — visualization of a multimodal distribution with two or more distinct peaks.

title: Stripes
description: Day 11 — warming stripes style chart encoding a continuous variable as color bands across time.

title: Data.gov
description: Day 12 — chart made from an open government dataset sourced from data.gov.

title: Clusters
description: Day 13 — scatterplot or dimensionality reduction showing natural groupings in multivariate data.

title: Kinship
description: Day 14 — network or genealogical chart showing relationships between entities.

title: Complicated
description: Day 15 — intentionally complex or layered chart showing multidimensional relationships.

title: Negative
description: Day 16 — visualization of a negative correlation or a chart using negative space as a design element.

title: El País
description: Day 18 — chart styled after El País's data visualization team, adapted for a Brazilian dataset.

title: Smooth
description: Day 19 — smoothing techniques applied to noisy time series data to reveal underlying trends.

title: Urbanization
description: Day 20 — long-run urbanization trend showing Brazil's rapid urban transition over the 20th century.

title: Fossils
description: Day 21 — fossil fuel production or consumption trends over a long historical horizon.

title: Stars
description: Day 22 — astronomical or star-rating data visualized over time.

title: Log Scale
description: Day 23 — time series plotted on a logarithmic scale to show exponential growth or proportional change.

title: WHO
description: Day 24 — chart using World Health Organization data on a global health indicator over time.

title: Risk
description: Day 25 — visualization of probabilistic risk, showing distributions of outcomes or event probabilities.

title: Monochrome
description: Day 26 — single-color chart using shading, opacity, and weight to encode uncertainty without relying on hue.

title: Noise
description: Day 27 — chart that embraces or visualizes noise and randomness as part of its message.

title: Inclusion
description: Day 28 — visualization exploring social inclusion, inequality, or access gaps in a population.

title: Extraterrestrial
description: Day 29 — astronomical or space-themed chart dealing with scales of uncertainty beyond human intuition.

title: National Geographic
description: Day 30 — final chart of the 2025 challenge, styled after National Geographic's cartographic and editorial visual language.

title: Interest Rates and Housing Affordability
description: How rising interest rates eroded housing affordability in Brazil — the minimum income required to finance a typical home tracked against the SELIC cycle.

title: Uruguay's Aging Population
description: Stacked area chart of Uruguay's projected population by age group, with the share of elderly residents expected to more than triple by 2100.

title: Unemployment Rates by State
description: Choropleth map of state-level unemployment rates, highlighting the divide between low-unemployment Southern and Mid-Western states and the Northeast.

title: Births and Deaths: Projection vs Census
description: Bar chart comparing projected and observed births and deaths, part of an analysis of why the 2022 census came in 10 million people below projections.

title: Demographic Flows During the Pandemic
description: Line panels tracking births and deaths through the pandemic years, showing the falling-natality and rising-mortality squeeze on population growth.

title: Excess Deaths in the Pandemic
description: Area chart of the surge in deaths during the COVID-19 pandemic, one of the factors behind the census undershoot.

title: Population Pyramid: Projection vs Census
description: Demographic pyramid contrasting the projected 2022 age structure with what the census actually found, age group by age group.

title: Unemployment Fell in Every State
description: Dumbbell chart of unemployment rates by state in the post-pandemic recovery, showing the decline across all 27 states from 2019 to 2023.

title: Population Growth in Southern Brazil
description: Municipal-level map of population change in Brazil's South from the 2022 census, separating growing coastal corridors from shrinking interior towns.

title: Metro Ridership by Line
description: Small multiples of São Paulo metro ridership by line, showing that no line had returned to pre-pandemic levels by 2023.

title: Metro System Ridership
description: Stacked area chart of total system ridership by line, with weekday ridership still down roughly 20% relative to 2019.

title: Real House Prices in Brazil
description: Real (inflation-adjusted) house price indices for Brazil, asking where exactly the much-discussed housing crisis shows up in the data.

title: G1-Style Bar Chart
description: Replication of G1's editorial bar chart style applied to the evolution of Brazil's unemployment rate.

title: Nexo-Style Bar Chart
description: Replication of Nexo Jornal's stacked bar style showing the share of driver's licenses held by age group.

title: Nexo-Style Heatmap
description: Replication of Nexo Jornal's heatmap of annual GDP growth across Latin American countries.

title: More Elderly than Young
description: Bar chart of the share of cities where the elderly already outnumber the young, a companion to the aging index maps.

title: Life Expectancy in São Paulo
description: Choropleth of life expectancy across São Paulo districts — a 23-year gap separates Jardim Paulista (82) from Anhanguera (under 60).

title: Car Ownership in São Paulo
description: Map of cars per household across São Paulo districts: lowest in the old center, highest in wealthy central neighborhoods like Pacaembu and Jardim Europa.

title: College Education in São Paulo
description: Share of adults with higher education by district, decaying steadily from the expanded center toward the periphery.

title: GDP per Person, Three Ways
description: Bump chart of rich-country GDP per person rankings at market rates, adjusted for costs, and adjusted for hours worked — in the style of The Economist.

title: Car-Dependent Districts
description: Ranking of São Paulo's most and least car-dependent districts, based on the Metrô Origin-Destination survey.

title: Cars and Income
description: Scatterplot of car ownership against household income across São Paulo zones, the headline relationship of a discrete-choice analysis.

title: Car Ownership and Age
description: Inverted-U relationship between the age of the household head and the probability of owning a car, with a quadratic fit.

title: Car Ownership by Income Level
description: Share of households owning a car by income bracket, rising monotonically with household income.

title: Access to Hospitals in São Paulo
description: Accessibility map of São Paulo measuring the minimum cycling time to the nearest hospital or hospital bed.

title: Seasonal Patterns in Temperature
description: Seasonal plot of average temperatures in Porto Alegre, overlaying each year as a line to expose the annual cycle.

title: Housing Affordability in São Paulo
description: Price-to-income ratio map of São Paulo, showing the unequal geography of financial access to homeownership.

title: Construction Costs vs House Prices
description: Cost inflation outpacing home price appreciation over the past decade, comparing Brazil's main residential price and construction cost indices.

title: House Prices in the Long Run
description: Nominal home prices rising more than six-fold over the long run, contextualizing Brazil's residential price index history.

title: Energy Demand and GDP
description: Electricity demand as a monthly proxy for GDP — and how the two series have diverged in recent years.

title: Energy Demand by Sector
description: Residential and commercial electricity demand driving total consumption growth, while industrial demand stagnates.

title: Rent Indices Diverge in the Pandemic
description: Rent indices breaking from their historical trend during the pandemic, suggesting the start of a new rental cycle.

title: Rent vs Sale Price Changes
description: Scatterplot relating rent and sale price variation across cities, probing the equilibrium between the two markets.

title: HDI in São Paulo
description: Human Development Index across São Paulo at the UDH (Human Development Unit) level, from the Atlas Brasil project.

title: Income Distribution in São Paulo
description: Income distribution in São Paulo mapped on Uber's H3 hexagonal grid, using IPEA's Access to Opportunities data.

title: Verticalization and Apartment Size
description: Scatterplot relating the number of dwellings to the share of apartments across Brazilian cities, from the 2022 census.

title: GDP and Recessions
description: Brazilian GDP with recession periods shaded, following the CODACE business cycle chronology.

title: Recession and Recovery Paths
description: Comparison of Brazil's recent recessions by depth and time to recovery, indexed to each cycle's peak.

title: Traffic Accidents by Hour
description: Distribution of São Paulo traffic accidents by hour of day, peaking with the evening rush.

title: Greatest Films: Critics vs Public
description: Dot plot comparing how the same films rank in critics' lists versus public online votes.

title: Film Rankings by Decade
description: Small-multiple histograms of top-ranked films by decade of release, contrasting critics' lists with public rankings.

title: Alternatives to Radar Plots
description: Diverging bar panels as a cleaner alternative to radar plots for comparing categories across entities.

title: Real Estate Market Conditions
description: Average market conditions across selected years, the working example from a post on radar plots and their alternatives.

title: Curitiba: Household Growth 2010–2022
description: Census-tract panels comparing total households in Curitiba between the 2010 and 2022 censuses.

title: Curitiba: Income per Capita by Tract
description: Household income per capita in deciles across Curitiba's census tracts, the finest geographic scale available.

title: Household Density Grid — São Paulo
description: Dwelling density in São Paulo on a 100×100m statistical grid from the 2022 census.

title: Top GDP Contribution by City
description: Map of Brazilian municipalities colored by the economic sector contributing most to local GDP, from the 2021 National Accounts.

title: Millennials and Gen-Z Rule Brazil
description: Age histogram of Brazil's population colored by generation — almost 100 million people are in the 12–42 range.

title: The Demographic Aging of Japan
description: Sequence of demographic pyramids showing Japan's age structure inverting over time, from a tutorial on pyramids in ggplot2.

title: GitHub Contributions Heatmap
description: Replication of GitHub's contributions calendar heatmap built entirely in ggplot2.

title: Economic Recessions Punchcard
description: Punchcard plot mapping recession episodes across two categorical dimensions, the showcase example from a punchcard tutorial.

title: Film Ratings over the Decades
description: Replication of Nexo's chart of IMDb ratings for the 250 best-rated films grouped by decade of release.

title: Metro Region Growth Slowdown
description: Population growth by city size class, showing mid-sized cities leading while major metro regions stall for the first time.

title: Brazil's Demographic Transition
description: Panel of demographic pyramids tracing Brazil's transition: an aging population coexisting with the largest youth generation in its history.

title: Dependency Ratios Across Brazil
description: Map contrasting elderly and youth dependency ratios across Brazilian municipalities, from the 2022 census.

title: Personal Optimism, National Pessimism
description: Redesigned survey chart showing Brazilians rate their personal situation far better than the country's — from a post on fixing bad charts.

title: Fiscal Irresponsibility and Impeachment
description: Redesigned stacked bars on public opinion about impeachment justifications, applying modern information design to a flawed original.

title: Majority Supports Impeachment
description: Clean dot-and-interval redesign of a survey chart on impeachment approval, the third makeover in the series.

title: ARIMA: Simulated Series
description: Panel of simulated AR and MA processes illustrating the Box-Jenkins identification step in an ARIMA tutorial.
